title: senecio radiatus
intro: Senecio radiatus, also known as the radiate ragwort, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones, which have shown potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been associated with various health benefits, including the reduction of pain and inflammation, as well as the promotion of wound healing. Senecio radiatus can be prepared as an infusion or tincture, and is often used in herbal medicine to support the immune system and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues.
